input.background: Recall the 'air samples' illustrative data presented earlier in this chapter. Table 4.2 lists data for particulate matter at two sampling sites.
input.question: For site 2, calculate Q1, Q3, and IQR based on the ordered array of data: 32, 33, 34, 36, 36, 38, 39, 40.

site_2_data.description: Ordered array of particulate matter data for site 2
